description: Deuxième ville du Royaume-Uni avec l'une des plus grandes communautés musulmanes d'Europe, Birmingham abrite la grande mosquée centrale et le Balti Triangle.

description_en: Birmingham, in the United Kingdom, is a halal-friendly destination with a Halal Trust Score of 4.5/5. Muslim travelers will find 142 halal restaurants listed, 1 mosques, real-time prayer times and the Qibla direction — a complete guide to travel with peace of mind.
metaDescription_en: Halal guide to Birmingham: 142 halal restaurants listed, 1 mosques, prayer times and tips for Muslim travelers. Halal Trust Score 4.5/5.
